svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"04_s_left_right","label":"Left-right S curve","topology":"Keep one main road from B0 to T0 with a readable S curve: first left, then right, then into the castle.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
